steps.title: Use the Or31 mechanism
steps.content: EBF repels mosquitoes by activating one odor receptor, Or31, and that receptor is present in all mosquito species known to carry diseases. A useful path for new repellents should build on that specific, broadly shared receptor mechanism.

steps.title: Reject unrelated next steps
steps.content: B concerns extracting EBF, not developing new repellent components. C shifts to receptor locations, which does not follow from the discovery of the useful target. D asks about the maximum number of receptors a molecule can activate, but the key finding is that one receptor matters. The answer is A.
